# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Prevent sqs policy too permissive.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing'

Parameters:
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (4 days)
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
  
  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
  
  MaximumMessageSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 262144
    Description: Maximum message size in bytes
    MinValue: 1024
    MaxValue: 262144

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaximumMessageSize
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      DelaySeconds: 0
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EventProcessing

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: DeadLetterQueue

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-event-processing-topic'
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EventProcessing

  EventProcessingTopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  TopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - SNS:Publish
              - SNS:Subscribe
              - SNS:GetTopicAttributes
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueURL'
  
  QueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueARN'
  
  QueueName:
    Description: Name of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueName'
  
  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQ-URL'
  
  DeadLetterQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQ-ARN'
  
  TopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicARN'
  
  TopicName:
    Description: Name of the SNS Topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicName'
